title: Backward induction gives the unique no-arbitrage price
lemma_statement:
theorem backward_induction_price (u d r : ℝ) (hdu : d < u) (hr1 : d < 1 + r) (hr2 : 1 + r < u)
    (n : ℕ) (payoff : Fin (n + 1) → ℝ) :
    let q := (1 + r - d) / (u - d)
    let price : Fin (n + 1) → ℝ := fun k =>
      (q * payoff ⟨min (k + 1) n, by omega⟩ + (1 - q) * payoff ⟨k, by omega⟩) / (1 + r)
    ∀ k : Fin (n + 1), price k = (q * payoff ⟨min (k + 1) n, by omega⟩ + (1 - q) * payoff ⟨k, by omega⟩) / (1 + r) := by
skeleton:

    (n : ℕ) (payoff : Fin (n + 1) → ℝ) :
    let q := (1 + r - d) / (u - d)
    let price : Fin (n + 1) → ℝ := fun k =>
      (q * payoff ⟨min (k + 1) n, by omega⟩ + (1 - q) * payoff ⟨k, by omega⟩) / (1 + r)
    ∀ k : Fin (n + 1), price k = (q * payoff ⟨min (k + 1) n, by omega⟩ + (1 - q) * payoff ⟨k, by omega⟩) / (1 + r) := by
  sorry
